view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement to detect empty slots within 24-48 hours is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement to detect empty slots within 24-48 hours is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the system can detect empty slots and respond with a discount offer. The linked use case clearly outlines the scenario where a photographer's empty slot is detected, and a flash sale is initiated to fill it, demonstrating the system's capability to meet the requirement. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that bookings are being made, indicating that the system is functioning as intended.
